articles.title: Apple Deals: MacBooks, AirPods, iPads
articles.summary: Apple has Memorial Day sales. Get discounts on MacBooks. Save on AirPods and iPads now.
articles.impact: Save money on Apple products during Memorial Day sales.

articles.title: Sony Wearable AC for Summer
articles.summary: Sony made a small wearable air conditioner. It is for staying cool in hot weather. Wear it to beat the heat.
articles.impact: Sony's new wearable device keeps you cool during summer heatwaves.

articles.title: AMD Graphics Card Goes Global
articles.summary: AMD's RX 9070 GRE is now global. It was only in China. Now it is available everywhere.
articles.impact: AMD's popular graphics card is becoming available worldwide soon.

articles.title: Smart Glasses Industry Sees Progress
articles.summary: Making smart glasses is hard. Xreal believes they solved it. They work with Google on this.
articles.impact: A smart glasses company believes it has solved the industry's challenges.

articles.title: James Bond Game: Leak to Release
articles.summary: Game footage leaked online. The company removed it. Then they released official game clips.
articles.impact: Leaked James Bond game footage was followed by an official release.

articles.title: Pixel 11 'Glow' Feature Questioned
articles.summary: An image from a Google event showed something. People thought it was a new Pixel feature. It was likely not real.
articles.impact: A supposed new Pixel phone feature seen at an event may not be real.

articles.title: AirPods Controls May Improve
articles.summary: Apple plans easier AirPods controls. They aim to reduce annoyance. No extra app is needed for this.
articles.impact: Apple is working to make controlling AirPods less frustrating for users.

articles.title: Two AMG Cars: Engines, Prices
articles.summary: Two AMG cars are for sale. One has 6 cylinders for $43k. The other V8 costs $69k.
articles.impact: A choice is offered between two used AMG cars with different engines and prices.
